もうひと踏ん張りだぞ！

/ci1 2 はあはあ……
なんで、修了任務からこんなことに……

/ci1 2 Alright, the Collection Point is just
ahead. We have to endure a bit longer!

/ci1 2 Huff, huff...
Why did this have to happen right after our
certification mission?
